channel.title: Python on Willem Mirkovich
channel.description: Recent content in Python on Willem Mirkovich

item.title: Building AI Agents with mcp-use + fastapi + ollama
item.description:
One of the more exciting capabilities to come out of the AI craze of 2025 is Model Context Protocol, a standardized way for LLM models to interact with software tools, such as filesystems, databases or HTTP servers.

While getting MCP servers setup and configured with things like Claude and Copilot via VSCode is possible, I ultimately found this clunky, and not condusive to sharing across teams or organizations.

Enter mcp-use, a cool new tool that does the heavy lifting of standardizing how you can hook up multiple MCP servers with a given LLM model to create an AI Agent that can be deployed and utilized.
